title: The Little Seed
story: A tiny seed lay beneath the soil, wondering if it would ever become anything special. Day after day it quietly grew roots before anyone could see it. Eventually it broke through the ground and blossomed into a beautiful flower. Just like the seed, your growth often happens before anyone notices it.

title: The Quiet Lake
story: Imagine sitting beside a peaceful lake at sunset. The water is still, birds are softly singing, and a gentle breeze touches your face. With every deep breath, your worries drift away like leaves floating across the water.

title: The Mountain Climber
story: A climber reached the top of a mountain not by taking giant leaps, but by taking one careful step after another. Every small step mattered. Your journey is exactly the same.
